transportedTraceSpace.name: X_aug
transportedTraceSpace.definition: closure Ran(R_aug) with quotient norm inf{||f||_V:R_aug f=x}

transportLimitNonnegativeInputStatus.label: transport-limit D_aug nonnegativity
transportLimitNonnegativeInputStatus.reason: The transport-limit theorem gives a nonnegative trace-side limit form D_aug on X_aug.

transportLimitClosedFormInputStatus.label: closed repaired form limit
transportLimitClosedFormInputStatus.reason: The transport-limit theorem gives the closed repaired augmented form as the finite repaired-form limit.

positiveTailInputStatus.label: positive Volterra tail input
positiveTailInputStatus.reason: The positive Volterra tail theorem supplies the remaining completed-domain nonnegative tail input.

transportConsequenceStatus.label: transport consequence
transportConsequenceStatus.reason: The two transport-limit conclusions and the positive tail input imply the narrow transport consequence.

proof: Import the positive Volterra tail theorem.
Expose only D_aug>=0 on X_aug and the closed repaired-form conclusion.
